zh.lifeSummary: 當William Perry I於1515年1月11日出生在英國戴文艾可謝特時，他的父親Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton35歲，母親Agnes Stalworth33歲。他於大約1538年與Elizabeth Coney在英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1565年2月11日在英國戴文梅波利享年50歲，埋葬在英國戴文梅波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Perry I于1515年1月11日出生在英国戴文艾可謝特时，他的父亲Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton35岁，母亲Agnes Stalworth33岁。他于大约1538年与Elizabeth Coney在英国林可爾史爾吉爾頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1565年2月11日在英国戴文梅波利享年50岁，埋葬在英国戴文梅波利。

nameMeanings.name: Perry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Herry ‘son of Herry’, a variant of the personal name Harry (see Harris ).

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a pear tree (Middle English piri(e), peri(e), puri(e), Old English pirige, pyrige), or a habitational name for someone who owned or came from a place so named. This surname and a number of variants have been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

variants.name: Peery
meanings: Irish: variant of   Perry  , taken to Ireland at the time of thePlantation of Ulster and in the Cromwellian period.

variants.name: Pear
meanings: English: topographic name from residence by a pear tree (Middle English pere, Old English peru, pere). Compare Perry .
English: nickname from Middle English pere, Old French per, peer ‘peer or paragon’, also ‘companion’.

variants.name: Peary
meanings: History: Robert E. Peary (1856–1920) was a U.S.-born explorer, who in 1909 led the first successful expedition to the North Pole. Peary Land in the north of Greenland is named after him, as he explored there in 1892 and 1900.

variants.name: Perrie
meanings: Scottish: variant of Perry 2. Alternatively, perhaps from the Old French personal name Pierre; see Pierce .

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Perryman
meanings: English (Devon): elaborated form of Perry , with Middle English man, probably denoting one who lived near a pear tree; see Pearman .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Perry I was born on 11 January 1515, in Exeter, Devon, England, his father, Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton, was 35 and his mother, Agnes Stalworth, was 33. He married Elizabeth Coney about 1538, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 11 February 1565, in Membury, Devon, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Membury, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Perry I est né le 11 janvier 1515, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes Stalworth, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Coney environ 1538, à Kirton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 février 1565, à Membury, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Membury, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Perry I am 11. Januar 1515 in Exeter, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton 35 und seine Mutter Agnes Stalworth 33. Er hat um 1538 in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth Coney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Februar 1565 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Membury, Devon, England und wurde in Membury, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Perry I è nato il il 11 gennaio 1515 nel Exeter, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Stalworth, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Coney circa 1538, nel Kirton, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1565, nel Membury, Devon, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Membury, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Perry Iが1515年1月11日にイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirktonは35歳，母Agnes Stalworthは33歳であった。約1538年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンでElizabeth Coneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1565年2月11日にイギリスデボンメンブリーで50歳で死去し，イギリスデボンメンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Perry I(이)가 1515년 1월 11일 영국 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Stalworth(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1538년 영국 링코실르 커턴에서 Elizabeth Coney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 2월 11일 영국 데폰 버이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 버이에 묻혔다.

pt.11 January 1515–11 February 1565: 11 de janeiro de 1515–11 de fevereiro de 1565
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Perry I nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1515, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Stalworth, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Coney aproximadamente 1538, em Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1565, em Membury, Devon, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Membury, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Perry I родился 11 января 1515 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Stalworth, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Coney около 1538 г. в местности киртон, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 11 февраля 1565 г. в местности мембури, девон, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности мембури, девон, Англия.

es.11 January 1515–11 February 1565: 11 de enero de 1515–11 de febrero de 1565
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Perry I nació el 11 de enero de 1515, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Albert Richard Perry Of Kirkton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agnes Stalworth, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Coney aproximadamente 1538, en Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1565, en Membury, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Membury, Devon, Inglaterra.
